purpose: combine only independently passing alpha candidates under the user's single global pending-plus-open slot constraint
eligibility_rule: A member enters the portfolio only if it passes its own frozen 2024 OOS contract at 20bp and 30bp. Failed members are omitted without parameter changes or replacement.

competition_rule.different_event_priority: earliest actual entry eligibility; any pending or open higher-priority or earlier trade occupies the sole slot until cancellation or exit
competition_rule.member_internal_choice: retain each member's already-frozen symbol, horizon, score, stop, and exit logic

economic_rationale.V16: common BTC-ETH flow confirmation with higher opportunity supply
economic_rationale.V14: regularized public-state model as a lower-priority residual opportunity source

selection_disclosure.priority_choice: V15-V16-V14 was selected from economic information hierarchy; nearby tested priorities changed 20bp net R by less than 0.31R
selection_disclosure.not_claimed: this is not an independent result and cannot rescue any failed member

oos_policy.must_outperform: the portfolio must exceed the best eligible member's 20bp terminal multiple without a worse maximum drawdown by more than 50%
oos_policy.result_if_failed: retain any independently passing member but reject the combined portfolio
oos_policy.result_if_passed: exact aggregate-trade protective-stop and funding replay, then untouched 2025 holdout
